input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.13.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.13.1.3
            TITLE: the inspection approval is contingent on the vehicle remaining in the required condition

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.13.1.3: The Inspection Approval is contingent on the vehicle remaining in the required condition
IN.13.1.3 The Inspection Approval is contingent on the vehicle remaining in the required condition 
throughout the competition.

final_answer: The Inspection Approval is contingent on the vehicle remaining in the required condition throughout the competition.
